title: Proper Logger Configuration: Make Loggers Private, Static, and Final
description: Ensure loggers are private, static, and final to prevent unnecessary object creation and improve code readability.
recommendation: Use private static final loggers with a consistent naming convention.
impact: Improves code readability and reduces unnecessary object creation.

compliant: private static final Logger LOGGER = LoggerFactory.getLogger(Foo.class);

checks.message: Loggers should be private static final.
